prediction-immutability.description: 阻止修改 predictions/ 目录中已写文件的 ## 预测 段

session-start.command: powershell -Command "Write-Host 'Cheat on Content 状态:'; if (Test-Path 'f:\stradust\content\STATUS.md') { Get-Content 'f:\stradust\content\STATUS.md' -Head 20 } else { Write-Host '未初始化' }"
session-start.description: Session 启动时自动显示状态看板
